Configure the app when installing as a P: Configure the app when installing as a PWA (desktop/mobile). Reload the page after saving to update.
No image → the first letter of the app n: No image → the first letter of the app name on the theme color.
Saved. Reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) to update t: Saved. Reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) to update the installed app.
Up to 5 shortcuts to your pages, shown a: Up to 5 shortcuts to your pages, shown as a bar / button / avatar-menu.
Avatar-menu shortcuts always show in the: Avatar-menu shortcuts always show in the account menu (this rule is ignored).
Leave empty to count all rows. Otherwise: Leave empty to count all rows. Otherwise a NocoBase filter object.

Title: Title
On Android/desktop Chrome & Edge the pro: On Android/desktop Chrome & Edge the prompt appears automatically when installable. On iPhone/iPad it shows Safari “Add to Home Screen” steps.
Add to your home screen for quick access: Add to your home screen for quick access.
Tap the Share button in Safari (the squa: Tap the Share button in Safari (the square with an up arrow).
Tap “Add” — the app icon appears on your: Tap “Add” — the app icon appears on your home screen.
Click the install icon (⊕ / screen) at t: Click the install icon (⊕ / screen) at the right of the address bar.
Tap “Badge” on an item to show a live co: Tap “Badge” on an item to show a live count (like the badge plugin).
